_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=91.5 (set at 92.09 after oauth.ts:89 true-branch + 311 Content-Type pin + skills request-init pins + skills.ts:120/223 + ollama:318 serviceId, buffer 0.59). The ratchet is non-decreasing: bump these up as the score climbs further, never lower.
